task_completion.description: Navigate to the customer profile for Dr. Julian Blackwood.

task_completion.description: Open the edit screen for the customer's profile.

task_completion.description: Enter the new corporate email address.

task_completion.description: Save the profile and verify both emails are present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final saved customer profile view for Dr. Julian Blackwood displays both 'julian.b@university.local' and 'j.blackwood@nexus-corp.com'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeScout graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeScout interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is a functional FreeScout help desk in a browser, not a text editor or a static mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to manipulate the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer Name: Dr. Julian Blackwood. Original Email: julian.b@university.local. New Email to Add: j.blackwood@nexus-corp.com. The task requires both emails to be present on the customer's profile at the end; the original email must not be overwritten or deleted.
